title: Monetdb crashes when using group by
description: Dear MonetDB Developers, I came across a crash in using `group by` in MonetDB. Whenever convenient, it would mean a lot if you could take a look. I sincerely appreciate your efforts in continuously improving MonetDB’s robustness. poc ```sql CREATE TABLE v0 ( v1 FLOAT ) ; SELECT count ( * ) FROM v0 GROUP BY v1 + 1 , v1 ; ``` ### Mclient output mclient generate the following ouput: unexpected end of file and mserver is terminated fish: Job 1, 'AFL_IGNORE_PROBLEMS=1 /usr/loca…' terminated by signal SIGABRT ### merovingian log output : /home/MonetDB/sql/server/rel_optimize_proj.c:1645: sql_rel *rel_groupby_cse(visitor *, sql_rel *): Assertion `e2_in_exps' failed.) ### Relevant source code
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE v1 ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value REAL, description TEXT );
INSERT INTO v1 (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 1.5, 'test1'), (2, NULL, 'test2'), (3, 2.5, 'test3');
CREATE TABLE v2 ( category TEXT, amount REAL );
SELECT category, SUM(amount) FROM v2 GROUP BY category, amount + 1;
key_bug_features: Crash when using group by with complex expressions
